textByHash.93a365776045eb1ad4df3c8c7287fa7d316a75db: Do not waste my time with trivial questions. I am the Great Kolodion, master of battle magic. I have an arena to run.
textByHash.206a3f5c03c3ffb7e3262d67f6e828ea22c76399: Hah! A wizard of your level? Don't be absurd.
textByHash.ddaab77ee9c3dd9440a74466989bf1214c133d4f: Hey there, how are you? Are you enjoying the bloodshed?
textByHash.a6c5b4e4c92b02ac5d5f4cfd6f380c5c62376f4f: A shame. You're a good battle mage. I hope to see you soon.
textByHash.98fd58b3ffb7ece08c13e9c73605f0023df4413b: Experience, my friend, experience. Once you've used the spell enough times in the arena, you'll be able to use them in the rest of Gielinor.
textByHash.c5eac42bef956257d2a1c167fb5b1f2241fb0de8: Not so good for the citizens; they won't stand a chance.
textByHash.04c0c8a7cb0e6b839f5ec775ec2541d5aa72a2f9: You still need to train with the strike spell inside the arena before you can use it outside.
textByHash.11799bd70a1bf525bb905bf3fdf74ab6ba71ff51: You have completed over half of the training needed to use the strike spell outside of the arena.
textByHash.67eb7901de1b7c45280dbcaa50f1e63a1c9085db: You are almost ready to use the strike spell outside of the arena.
textByHash.8b6df9ae91a22ef1ddefd6328afe712a856f30e7: You're experienced enough to use the strike spell anywhere.
textByHash.96c2f253db29f8761b2b075ac25effe9c95b5179: You still need to train with the claw spell inside the arena before you can use it outside.
textByHash.aa663dcf152d79aeffef0df9e68d0dbe4b8b30d0: You have completed over half of the training needed to use the claw spell outside of the arena.
textByHash.8d0bb18e9a58aa2299e5446d498b9f639e1b1366: You are almost ready to use the claw spell outside of the arena.
textByHash.e3853a03bc99394ab9fff4cab3f20b0fae652357: You're experienced enough to use the claw spell anywhere.
textByHash.d70f3281c7cadc44c8a986e551e7ef313cf72528: You still need to train with the flame spell inside the arena before you can use it outside.
textByHash.dbc340ea49f27caa832dbddb046e473a50e1cb76: You have completed over half of the training needed to use the flame spell outside of the arena.
textByHash.c907a28875677d64422eb4d610db0adf3d8e3a57: You are almost ready to use the flame spell outside of the arena.
textByHash.a6dff391919c1c6d4810ab8fcffac58a4e93ea33: You're experienced enough to use the flame spell anywhere.
textByHash.618f8d2ae4fa32b34ef336b622aef409e91ca448: You still need to learn how to cast all god spells outside of the arena.
textByHash.8144ac762ca8e8eecb27ce3ade081e72bfb991c3: I've made a note of the spells you still need to learn in your journal.
textByHash.34fa124fb2c1b04deff2404ead7ef71f995688b5: However, a wizard of your level wouldn't stand a chance.
textByHash.46e9e7c5a66a45bccd436ba44a027f6dbf0c8cbc: I am one of the most powerful mages in existence. But even my power has limitations. There are some beings however that have power exceeding even my own.
textByHash.9c18912ff9a30cec6ec953422d88eb6b64cfe57d: You're not allowed in there. Come downstairs if you want to enter my arena.
textByHash.0123691e403a3da427789acc8d9cc1a1df304ceb: I am the great Kolodion, master of battle magic, and this is my battle arena. Top wizards travel from all over Gielinor to fight here.
textByHash.00f5dd9bd8025b9454b22f985ee6d87f5ea6f441: My arena is open to any high level wizard, but this is no game. Many wizards fall in this arena, never to rise again. The strongest mages have been destroyed.
textByHash.c161e03a66ef28b5b6af480247ab4af8ed1024ab: If you're sure you want in?
textByHash.214a5d86c7465f22c0d7f375f8dd8fe858d8cdee: Good, good. You have a healthy sense of competition.
textByHash.ea573b74619de906d4dc58faa47cb0fb0f8e9ab7: Remember, traveller - in my arena, hand-to-hand combat is useless. Your strength will diminish as you enter the arena, but the spells you can learn are amongst the most powerful in all of Gielinor.
textByHash.947b60fc0a49d2484e287eef7dcb3dd0e1cee07f: Before I can accept you in, we must duel.
textByHash.1cada90fe0380fda4aef63e586b2a9eeb13f2125: I must first check that you are up to scratch.
textByHash.a924ade1640e4cde0c078a861424519e4cd87122: Not just any magician can enter - only the most powerful and most feared. Before you can use the power of this arena, you must prove yourself against me.
textByHash.31cdee9f66bc139de21360649e7b803a45e4d731: We learn how to use our magic to its fullest and how to channel the forces of the cosmos into our world...
textByHash.5c23b51d19608c0fff906fd9be3a43809be71a13: But mainly, I just like blasting people into dust.
textByHash.c3a84cf81b351f5f684f877724ca77167ec7e372: Nope, it's magic. But I know what you mean. So do you want to join us?
textByHash.a821328bd6b5f9b864f4db6b8047cd5392c02b4f: Well done, young adventurer; you truly are a worthy battle mage.
textByHash.f8b111a8bd5154d95617dc710fe7a8178ed70b5c: Step into the magic pool. It will take you to a chamber. There, you must decide which god you will represent in the arena.
textByHash.6f9555c8f699fea07716f1ec7ee2ec55d81c16cb: Hello, young mage. You're a tough one.
textByHash.bf99c21d490e329bb9abee3db85e562bfd8e31f8: I have detected three life forces within the Wilderness, each of them giving out a strange magical power, one unlike any I have ever felt before.
textByHash.c33f3970763540dd715e775f80c6c9886999795b: If we could harness the power of these beings, I could imbue your god cape with that power, greatly increasing its potential.
textByHash.1d8dfd82f9029c60ffec4219e422c08780fab06a: I will need you to kill these three beings and bring me their remains. Even in death, their power should be great enough for me to harness it for our own uses.
textByHash.d6ac77cd369c8151e4ad6c3124cf4332984a7cf0: Here, take this enchanted symbol of the gods. It will guide you to the creatures.
textByHash.93f7cc8899e9896ad5386343023df55abb716f8f: Bring me the remains of all three magical beings. Do this and I will imbue their combined power into a single god cape of your choice.
textByHash.dc4d6aa4b9de9429618d6412f861f695d056c3f1: You'll need to free up an inventory space before we continue.
textByHash.5718151eb1d9661ac2762753f119135806c8990f: I see... If you ever change your mind, you know where to find me.
textByHash.87ac80564f32ae83235fe89f31678df466288cf0: They can all be found in the Wilderness. The enchanted symbol can track their unique magical energies, leading you to their exact locations.
textByHash.1f9a59e4f2451eed36abfbf78b61b64a6adfc8a3: Be warned though, the symbol will take a blood sacrifice every time it's used.
textByHash.a152a4615b9b8175611566e98fc07a6f34050626: They can't be harmed by normal magic, melee or ranged attacks, you will need to use the god combat spell corresponding to the creature you are fighting.
textByHash.c138119c87c734b2e774bbd4716b7974c89b70eb: One is a justiciar. According to legend, the justiciars were the elite of Saradomin's forces. Some worked alone, operating as assassins behind enemy lines. Others led entire armies in Saradomin's name.
textByHash.77fdf7f2df8445c2bda7b45da8868cdb37d00a91: I couldn't tell you why this one wanders the Wilderness, but I suspect he has good reason.
textByHash.2ffaf21a79f6d12785d90aeed9d5ca4b6b9efa68: The second is a Demon of Zamorak. From what I can tell, he is completely mad. He roams the Wilderness, killing all who he comes across without mercy. Even his own kind do not escape his fury.
textByHash.ba1de982deecca145839a1ecb026479b8aa5edc0: He's known to battle the justiciar quite regularly, perhaps they are old enemies.
textByHash.ed6e9a3c0676a8292a72199a91d30d3372044bff: The final being is a Guthixian Ent. Like most followers of Guthix, he will avoid combat if possible. Make no mistake though, he is deadly when threatened.
textByHash.fada05428a2090490c44b7cfd63d9cfe764c9001: He seems to take great interest in the other two creatures. Maybe he is trying to keep a balance between them.
textByHash.028bb49ec59535889c0aacb4c6bd723576edaac2: All three of them give off a unique magical energy, one unlike any I have ever felt before. The fact that the three of them are so different, yet possess powers so similar, is very odd indeed.
textByHash.26dfde3cd53650dec318225261f0304b7557afb4: I'd be very interested in learning more about the source of their power.
textByHash.e7d8605d026e38cca865a59d04055e82f879d91b: Excellent work, , but we aren't finished yet.
textByHash.94d3729d1a1b72829bf1689f13a13dff2e258621: Excellent work, , now you just need to hand me the god cape you wish to have imbued with great power.
textByHash.ac5dd4fb9895db585dd312105e820fc9d24ecc5c: If you would like me to imbue any more capes, just bring me the remains of the respective creature.
textByHash.9629ebc3174a04efd0a844df1171ab137458bfd8: You'll have to bring me the Guthix creature's remains to imbue this cape.
textByHash.d3e0f48bce9aed593ef065681b33d33a6226b2de: You'll have to bring me the Saradomin creature's remains to imbue this cape.
textByHash.89fb3226c16afdd408d88fa3db24a4fc6c082908: You'll have to bring me the Zamorak creature's remains to imbue this cape.
textByHash.d24edbf653ee44c6d8034a388ac3ae36fabf906a: You may currently have a Saradomin cape, a Guthix cape and a Zamorak cape imbued, just hand over the cape when you're ready.
